creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
This is a port for getting the Gimp User Manual, a nice 
	comprehensive guide to using the Gimp.  It doesn't seem
	very well known that there's a guide to the Gimp so I thought
	it'd be nice if there was a port so people might see it when
	they add the Gimp to their system.  

	The port will fetch any of 3 versions.  I personally don't
	recommend the Postscript version as it's huge after unpacking,
	but if you want to print it out, it's the best.

Fix: #!/bin/csh -f
# Uuencoded gz-compressed .tar file created by csh script  uufiles
# For more info (11/95), see e.g. http://xxx.lanl.gov/faq/uufaq.html
# If you are on a unix machine this file will unpack itself: strip
# any mail header and call resulting file, e.g., gimp-manual.uu
# (uudecode ignores these header lines and starts at begin line below)
# Then say        csh gimp-manual.uu
# or explicitly execute the commands (generally more secure):
#    uudecode gimp-manual.uu ;   gunzip gimp-manual.tar.gz ;
#    tar -xvf gimp-manual.tar
# On some non-unix (e.g. VAX/VMS), first use editor to change filename
# in "begin" line below to gimp-manual.tar-gz , then execute
#    uudecode gimp-manual.uu
#    gzip -d gimp-manual.tar-gz
#    tar -xvf gimp-manual.tar
#
uudecode $0
chmod 644 gimp-manual.tar.gz
gunzip -c gimp-manual.tar.gz | tar -xvf -
rm $0 gimp-manual.tar.gz
exit
How-To-Repeat: 
	Below is a uuencoded tarball of the port.  Strip the header
	from the mail and follow the directions in the files header.
